color.description: Accent color for the loading spinner — a theme name or any CSS color.

width.description: A custom width (number → px, or any CSS length).

fullScreen.description: Cover the whole viewport (minus a small inset).

preventClose.description: Don't close on backdrop click / Escape — nudge with a shake instead.

blur.description: Frost the backdrop with a saturated blur.

overflowHidden.description: Deprecated — the page scroll is now always locked while a dialog is open.

autoWidth.description: Shrink the dialog to its content's width.

scroll.description: Scroll the content area when it's tall (instead of the page).

notCenter.description: Left-align the header instead of centering it.

loading.description: Show a loading spinner over the dialog.

update:modelValue.description: Emitted when the dialog opens or closes.

close.description: Emitted when the dialog is dismissed (close button, backdrop or Escape).

footer.description: A footer row, typically for actions.
